# 1inow

> 1inow is a voice-first personal command center for projects, tasks, decisions, voice capture, and daily execution — coordinated by Sense (Nova + Vera).

Site: https://1inow.com

## Public pages

- https://1inow.com/ — Product overview and sign-in entry
- https://1inow.com/how-it-works — Operating flow (capture → organize → execute → review)
- https://1inow.com/security-trust — Security and trust principles
- https://1inow.com/roadmap — Public development roadmap
- https://1inow.com/device-connections — Conversation and device intake direction
- https://1inow.com/principles/strategic-vs-tactical — Strategic vs tactical planning guide
- https://1inow.com/legal/privacy — Privacy policy
- https://1inow.com/legal/terms — Terms of use
- https://1inow.com/auth — Sign in / sign up

## Authenticated workspace (login required)

- Dashboard, projects, tasks, calendar, inbox, communication
- People, teams, team map, approvals, reports, portfolio
- Intelligence (memory, rules, questions, reminders)
- Vault search (`/files?q=`) and knowledge search (`/documents?q=`)
- Administration (users, roles, invitations, audit, voice settings)
- Sense sidebar: Chat (Vera) + Voice commands (Nova)

## Product facts (current code)

- Local Sense chat works without paid AI keys; OpenAI STT/TTS/chat is env-gated.
- Voice inbox persists in Supabase when org migrations are applied.
- Memory teach-back (“remember that…”) writes to `ai_memories`.
- File upload storage is not shipped; Vault/Documents search workspace records.

## Docs in repository

- docs/production-launch-checklist.md
- docs/voice-first-production-plan.md
- docs/supabase-migration-runbook.md
